reasoning: Koren, we need to target your poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance directly. Last ride showed a recovery state with lower intensity. Let's build towards the Alpine Loop climb by pushing through extended intensity to adapt your clearance ability.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 x (12 min over-unders: 4 min @ 210W, 2 min @ 245W, 4 min @ 213W, 2 min @ 249W)

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
